title: The field — drag what belongs together, together
prompt: Round 5: everything still alive, on one field. Distance is data — park kin close, strangers far, and name what lives in the gaps.

options.label: Halo Orbit II
options.description: Orbit mark, sabotage-hardened: thicker ring, single moon.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="32" ry="18" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="7"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="10" fill="#f59e0b"/></svg>

options.label: Ember Sink II
options.description: Flame-under-strata, simplified to two strokes and one flame.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M22 40l28-12 28 12" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="6"/><path d="M40 70a10 10 0 0 0 20 0c0-7-10-16-10-16s-10 9-10 16z" fill="#f59e0b"/></svg>

options.label: Prism Revenant
options.description: The killed prism, back once more as a control sample.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 20L80 72H20z" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M62 44l22-8" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

survey.elaborationPrompt: What do the clusters have in common that the gaps lack?
